nasb.text: because of their wickedness which they committed so as to provoke Me to anger by continuing to burn sacrifices and to serve other gods whom they had not known, neither they, you, nor your fathers.

esv.text: because of the evil that they committed, provoking me to anger, in that they went to make offerings and serve other gods that they knew not, neither they, nor you, nor your fathers.

cnv.text: 這是因為他們所行的惡事的緣故；他們向別神燒香，事奉它們，惹我發怒。這些神是他們和你們，以及你們的列祖所不認識的。

ccb.text: 这都是因为那里的居民犯罪作恶，向他们、你们和你们祖先都不认识的神明烧香祭拜，惹我发怒。
